raw_consumer_statement: Don't know where to begin. I have been charged random amounts from XXXX, since XX/XX/XXXX. I filed a dispute in XX/XX/XXXX and stopped using the card. Amounts ranged from {$9.00}, {$18.00}, {$7.00}, {$160.00}, I was sent a new card and did not activate it. I also received correspondence from the Citi Bank of suspicious possible fraudulent activity. I sent {$300.00} in XX/XX/XXXX to prevent finance charges. Nonetheless, I recently been receiving calls that the account is past due and haven't received a statement in months and no correspondence on the status of the disputed amounts. I have spent approximately two hours trying to resolve. Phone calls resulted in : " you need to speak with Security Operations '', you need to speak with " Fraud Department '', you need to speak with " Customer Service '', extremely muffled connection, difficultly understanding the person ( possible overseas connection ). The experience has been unbelievable. I ended up paying finance charges just to close the account/s.
